svg.title: System architecture for an AI-first loan origination platform
svg.desc: Four-tier architecture: Next.js frontend and FastAPI gateway on top, an agent orchestrator with four tools (extractor, rules engine, vector search, comms gateway), a reliability layer with four gates (schema validator, confidence gate, eval harness, audit log), and an infrastructure tier with PostgreSQL plus pgvector, Redis plus Arq workers, and external services Resend and the LLM API.
